77.reason: [This branch assumes c is a digit, but if input starts with a digit, it's handled correctly; however, after operators like * or /, the function cal_next consumes the next number and returns the following operator or '=', so this else may process non-digit characters incorrectly. Also, initial digit parsing doesn't reset temp properly in all cases.]

Also, initial digit parsing doesn't reset temp properly in all cases.]
